ccache /usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -g -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SimpleLogger.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libSimpleLogger.so -o ../../../../libSimpleLogger.so CMakeFiles/SimpleLogger.dir/SimpleLogger_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleLoggerLib.dir/SimpleLoggerLib_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleLoggerLib.dir/simple_logger.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,::::::::::::::::::::::::
